description.en: The wild Bactrian camel is a rare, hardy survivor of the Gobi Desert and is genetically distinct from domesticated camels.
description.zh: 野双峰骆驼是戈壁沙漠中罕见的生存专家，在基因上与家养骆驼完全不同。

anatomy.en: They have two small, pyramidal humps and are leaner than their domestic cousins. Their thick, sand-colored fur protects them from extreme temperatures, and they can drink saltwater that would kill other mammals.
anatomy.zh: 它们有两个较小的锥形驼峰，体型比家养骆驼更精瘦。厚实的沙色皮毛能抵御极端气温，它们甚至能饮用会令其他哺乳动物丧命的苦咸水。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Wild Bactrian camels are incredibly shy and live in small herds. They are masters of the desert, traveling vast distances to find sparse vegetation and seasonal water sources.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 野双峰骆驼非常害羞，以小群形式生活。它们是沙漠之王，为了寻找稀疏的植被和季节性水源，能长途跋涉极远的距离。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They are found only in four isolated locations: three in northwestern China (including the Lop Nur region) and one in the Gobi Desert of Mongolia.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们仅分布在四个相互隔离的区域：三个在中国西北部（包括罗布泊地区），一个在蒙古的戈壁沙漠。
